name: I have no witnesses to my West Valley City construction fall—what evidence do I need?
description: Photos, medicals, reports—lawyer finds more via investigation.

mainEntity.name: I have no witnesses to my West Valley City construction fall—what evidence do I need?

acceptedAnswer.text: Photos, medicals, reports—lawyer finds more via investigation.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical records, photos of the hazard/site, incident reports, and expert reconstruction suffice even without witnesses.** Sites change fast, so act quick[3]. **Key factors:** 1. Supervisor/employer reports. 2. OSHA/UOSH logs if investigated. 3. Video footage, maintenance records. 4. Your detailed account. Preserve everything before cleanup. Lawyer uses discovery to uncover more proof against liable parties.
